caption: A man wearing a white long-sleeved shirt, a red bow tie, and a tall, grey, textured hairpiece is speaking into a professional microphone. He is wearing over-ear headphones and sits in a room decorated with numerous framed photographs on the walls and clothing displayed on mannequins and racks in the background. A white box and a black bag are visible on a surface behind him. The man's facial expression shifts as he speaks, with his mouth opening and closing across the sequence. A red and white logo appears in the lower-left and lower-right areas of the scene, featuring a microphone icon and the text "GOSS TALK JOY PODCAST". The background remains static while the man continues his animated conversation, gesturing slightly with his head as he communicates.
